programmes.show_description: Venice sees an unprecedented plague of jellyfish, while in Canada, researcher Anawak is getting to the bottom of whale attacks. (S1, ep 3)
Northumbria Police answer a flood of 999 calls, while officers raid a property they suspect is being used by men to exploit young girls. (S5, ep 9)
Documentary series charting the exploits of the City of London police, charged with safeguarding the Square Mile at the heart of the crime-ridden capital. (S4, ep 2)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S9, ep 7)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S9, ep 8)
Biosecurity officer Jade makes an expensive witchcraft-related discovery. Also, some suspicious lampshades reach Customs. (S12, ep 1)
Immigration discovers an attempt to establish a dangerous and illegal business in New Zealand. Meanwhile, Customs uncovers a drugs scam. (S12, ep 2)
A dust cloud wreaks havoc on the Canterbury Plains and the cops sniff out some diesel fraud. (S4, ep 5)
A driver having a little too much fun on a South Island road trip is caught downing beers, and a couple on their honeymoon have trouble keeping their eyes on the road. (S4, ep 6)
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for a variety of suspected offences. (S17, ep 3)
Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for a variety of suspected offences. (S17, ep 4)
A British man wants to close the book on his failed Canadian marriage. Meanwhile, an old charge could end a budding romance. (S2, ep 22)
A giant x-ray machine finds an odd shape in a shipping container. At the mail centre, meanwhile, a strange declaration leads to contraband. (S2, ep 23)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary series following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists. (S6, ep 13)

New. Cameras follow the men and women of the US border protection agencies as they uphold the country's much debated immigration policies. (S2, ep 9)

The Maquis Part 1: When a Cardassian freighter is destroyed as it departs DS9, the finger of suspicion points at Federation colonists who now live in Cardassian territory.
Absolute Power: SG-1 notice a change in Daniel Jackson after he is reunited with the Harsesis child, Shifu (Lane Gates). (S4, ep 17)
Hide And Seek: A game causes one of the Athosian children to open a unit and unleash a dark entity. They soon realise that the harmless-looking cloud is anything but... (S1, ep 3)
Symbiosis: Picard has to decide whether to continue to supply a civilisation with a drug they have become dependent on, after they initially had to take it to combat a plague 200 years ago.
Follow Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the country's quarantine, customs, immigration and finance laws. (S16, ep 7)
Follow Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the country's quarantine, customs, immigration and finance laws. (S16, ep 8)
Murder in Suburbia: 35-year-old Zara Aleena was beaten to death just ten minutes from her home. The only evidence of the killer was one bloody fingerprint. (S3, ep 2)
Murder on the Moor: In 1975, school girl Lesley Molseed went to the shops and never came home. Could one 30-year-old piece of evidence reveal her killer? (S3, ep 3)
Sleeping Dogs: When the crew enter a wounded Klingon vessel, they are ambushed by a Klingon and left stranded on the sinking ship with Archer their only hope for survival. (S1, ep 14)
Cécile recommends stopping fishing off the coast and warning the population against using tap water, while the worms are investigated more closely. (S1, ep 4)
There is a tense stand-off as officers try to talk down a man brandishing a samurai sword, while the cells fill up during a busy Saturday night in Newcastle. (S5, ep 10)
Documentary series charting the exploits of the City of London police, charged with safeguarding the Square Mile at the heart of the crime-ridden capital. (S4, ep 3)

Customers uncover concealed drugs. Biosecurity New Zealand find some troublesome items in a spiritual healer's luggage. (S12, ep 3)
A woman is caught body packing highly illegal objects. Meanwhile, there's trouble in Biosecurity. (S12, ep 4)
The rescue chopper is called upon when there's a crash on the rainy roads of the Southern Alps. An unlucky driver's Nissan has been damaged by both a rock and an axe. (S4, ep 7)
There's trouble for speeding tourists who take a corner way too fast, and also for a man who tries to cheat the registration system when he's caught out by his ex-wife. (S4, ep 8)
A British national plans his very own Brexit. A package of happiness arrives at the mail centre, and Customs go on a boat-hunt in the Bay of Islands. (S11, ep 3)
An American woman attempts to smuggle a live cat across the border, and Customs find a soft toy stuffed with more than just stuffing... (S11, ep 4)
Immigration deal with a Singaporean national who claims to be meeting a mystery man. Plus, a flood in the biosecurity zone shuts down the airport. (S11, ep 5)
Documentary series following the men and woman who work to keep New Zealand's borders safe. (S11, ep 6)
While an American's trip to Alaska heads south, officers suspect a convicted drug dealer is taking his business north. A ship containing weapons is also searched. (S2, ep 14)
Officers stop a father and son packing loads of ammo, but can't find the gun. Meanwhile, the Vessel Search Unit find a suspect sailor on a US tug. (S2, ep 15)
A young man's lies could keep him from his fiancee, while the discovery of a gold bar and lots of cash spell trouble for another traveller. (S2, ep 16)
While a last-minute booking leads a farm worker down a rocky road, the arrival of some toy trucks rightfully arouses suspicion. (S2, ep 17)

A new season of Caught On Dashcam! From crazy weather to shocking road rage and the answer to why the chicken crossed the road, all caught on camera! (S5, ep 1)
From novice drivers to taxi nightmares and even a horse-riding shotgun, it's time to buckle up for a brand-new episode of Caught On Dashcam! (S5, ep 2)
A look at the clever new methods the police and public are using to catch criminals. (S7, ep 5)

A new season of the insightful documentary following the daily dramas of caring for cheeky primates at the Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre. (S17, ep 9)

New & Exclusive. Vancouver: Encounter coastal sea wolves, endangered marmots, Western Toad tadpoles and more as you explore one of the most extraordinary islands on the planet. (1 of 6)
New & Exclusive. K'gari: Touch down on the largest sand island in the world, as stingrays hunt soldier crabs in the tidal shallows, acid frogs evade vicious predators and more. (2 of 6)
Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions' camouflage. (4 of 5)
From extreme weather to parking disputes, prepare to say 'Did that REALLY just happen?' in another exciting episode of Caught on Dashcam! (S6, ep 9)
A man takes the law into his own hands when his daughter is brutally murdered. Action thriller with Bruce Willis, Mike Tyson and Thomas Jane. (2022)
Buckle up! It's time for a new series of Caught on Dashcam. The show that brings you the thrills and spills from the world of driving - all caught on camera! (S6, ep 1)
